questionHtml:
The image shows human red blood cells.

[Source: someoneice/123rf.com.]

 

Outline what will happen to human red blood cells if transferred to distilled water.
markschemeHtml:
cells absorb water by osmosis and swell/increase in volume
OR
cells burst/lyse;

meta.title: The image shows human red blood cells. [Source: someoneice/123rf.com.] Outline what will happen to human red blood cells if transferred to distilled water.
breadcrumbLabels: D2.3.3. Water movement by osmosis into or out of cells
